name: Screenshot intelligence
description: Classifies screenshots and photographed documents; receipts become staged transactions and bookings become staged tentative events — cross-domain writes ALWAYS stop for your review.
prompt: When new screenshots or photographed documents arrive, look at each one's preview and classify it. If it's a receipt, extract the merchant, amount, currency and date and stage a transaction. If it's a booking or confirmation, extract what/when and stage a tentative calendar event. Everything you extract stays a staged draft until I approve it — never publish across domains on your own.

vault.why: Reads new screenshots' preview/thumb derivatives, extracts structured data (receipts → transactions, bookings → events), and stages the rows for the owner's review (issue #299 phase 2 — cross-domain extraction never auto-publishes).
